title: Tundla Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Tundla with a Z-Score of +5.06. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Tundla is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 16.7 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 28%, and the wind speed is 8.8 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating demand, while the CDD is significantly high.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
